features: About Lynx: For over 30 years, Lynx has served knockout fragrances and today over 8 million guys across the UK & Ireland use Lynx products every day. Lynx, originally launched under the name of Axe, was later introduced to our UK lads in ’85. Kickstarting with three separate fragrances: Amber, Musk, and Spice. Absolute classics. But it doesn’t stop there. We’ve gone from fragrances to antiperspirants, stick, roll-on, shower gels, hair products, and more
description: " Transform your shower from ordinary to extraordinary with Lynx Jungle Fresh 3-in-1 Body Wash: an adventure into the wilderness that’ll have you coming up with excuses to get dirty just so you can experience it again. This hair, face and body cleanser kicks odour to the kerb with a revitalising palm leaf and amber scent – as fresh as Nature herself. No matter how big or small life gets, you’ll always feel refreshed. Better still, our body wash contains 100% plant-based prebiotics and 5x more moisturisers to hydrate your skin every time you shower. Revealing clean, fresh-smelling skin. Boost your fragrance game with our range of shower gels. Features: •Embrace your irresistibly untamed side with Lynx Jungle Fresh 3-in-1 Body Wash •This moisturising shower gel features an exhilarating palm leaf & amber scent •Our body wash washes away bacteria and provides up to 12 hours of invigorating fragrance •This hair, face and body cleanser is made with 100% plant-based moisturisers to keep your skin feeling irresistibly soft, naturally How to Use: Squeeze out Lynx Jungle Fresh hair, body and face wash into your hands and work into a rich, creamy lather. Massage it all over your body and rinse thoroughly. Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Disodium EDTA, PPG-6, Saccharide Isomerate, Limonene, CI 19140, CI 42090 Safety Warnings: Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Box Contains: Lynx 3-in-1 Body Wash Shower Gel Extra Jungle Fresh "
